title: Plasticraft
description: Turns your world into Lego bricks, block-accurate and tiled off!
body:
Check out the add-on pack Plasticraft Premium which adds features such as custom entity models and translucency support!

[Plasticraft Premium on Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/inferno31415/shop)

If you don't want to pay the $5 for Plasticraft Premium, you can also make a Youtube video with the free version of Plasticraft, and if it reaches 1000 views, I'll send you it for free!

This resource pack for Minecraft Java Edition 1.16+ makes the game look like Lego. Plasticraft was inspired by the creations of Cheesey Studios on youtube, as well as the existing Lego Minecraft product line. I have taken inspiration from AlexTestria's Brickcraft and Macio6's Minebricks, and created a new texture style that captures the simplistic and colorful look of Lego.
![Plasticraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2553ee9b94bd33f88ef33ed79b79552c6bfa673f.png)
Unlike resource packs like Minebricks and Brixel, which require specular reflections with shaders to see 3D details, Plasticraft has 3D block and item models that work in vanilla Minecraft. I have tried to balance detail and performance by optimizing the 3D blocks with cullfacing and only using complex models on less common blocks. I have chosen to make common blocks such as grass and stone be "tiled off", for both a smoother look and smoother running game. I hope you enjoy this pack, and be sure to check out the [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/nhHzHmnayF)!

[Plasticraft Changelog](https://tinyurl.com/plasticraft-changelog)

![Block Translator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f959a6435d04eb5083d7a13ad4e5d88a715a905a_0.webp)

For the best experience, I highly recommend this mod that centers plants like how Lego plants should be:
[Centered Plants Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/centered-plants)
